result: The R script was successfully executed. It loaded the four longitudinal cohort survey datasets, merged them by NSID, and harmonised the parental economic activity variables (mother and father) for waves 1 through 4 (ages 14-17) according to the specified mapping rules. The final dataset, containing NSID and the eight derived variables (`ecoactma14`, `ecoactpa14`, `ecoactma15`, `ecoactpa15`, `ecoactma16`, `ecoactpa16`, `ecoactma17`, `ecoactpa17`) with their respective factor labels, was written to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
